heading: Saturday Night:
text: Scattered evening snow showers north, mainly over high terrain.
temperature: Teens north, low to mid 20s south

heading: Sunday
text: Chance of snow or valley rain showers north, mainly in New York.

heading: Monday
text: Patchy freezing rain possible early in the east, otherwise scattered showers.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s west, mid 50s to around 60 east

heading: Tuesday
temperature: Upper 20s to upper 30s, steady or falling
